title: ostodes collina
intro: Ostodes collina, also known as Chinese dragon or Chinese dragon flower, is a plant species in the family Opiliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ostodes collina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
